locator.text: you won't believe what happened next

findings.why: viral-bait hook promising payoff the content never delivers

locator.text: many experts agree this changes everything

findings.why: no named expert, study, number, or date anywhere
metronomic evenly-paced delivery, no natural variation

top_fix: Cut the bait hook, name one real expert/number, and vary the pacing around the key point.
